data.title: Meet Some of the People Who Shaped the Nation's Story
data.description: Today in Boston, on May 29, 2026, USPS held a rededication for the Figures of the American Revolution stamps at the 2026 Boston World Exposition, coinciding with the stamp show's heroes theme day. This event celebrated the iconic figures portrayed on the stamps.

data.title: Toyota Turns Forza Horizon 6 into a Real-World Immersive "Barn Find" Experience at Westfield Century City
data.description: Toyota unveiled a unique two-day event that combines gaming, car enthusiasts' culture, and exploration, drawing inspiration from the recent launch of Forza Horizon 6. The event, known as "Lost & Found: The Challenge," will take place in PLANO, Texas starting on May 29, 2026. Participants can engage in interactive experiences that connect the virtual world of the game with real-world discovery. Additionally, Toyota will set up a Barn Find Pop-Up at Westfield as part of this activation. This initiative aims to engage fans and immerse them in the thrill of the new game, creating a memorable experience for attendees.

data.title: AI-Powered Innovation Earns Geotab Platinum Club Status Among Canada's Best Managed Companies
data.description: Geotab Inc., based in Oakville, Ontario, has secured more than 700 patents and boasts a network of over 6 million connected vehicles. The company is making significant strides in improving fleet operations worldwide. Recognized for its achievements for nine consecutive years, Geotab is a key player in the field of connected transportation, video telematics, and asset tracking. This success has solidified their position as a global leader in the industry.

data.title: Health Tech Founders Outperform Their Own Brands on LinkedIn
data.description: A recent 18-month study involving 50 health tech founders found that posts made by the founders led to a notable 4.1 times increase in qualified inbound traffic to company websites. Interestingly, despite brand pages investing significantly more in promotional efforts compared to founder accounts, they generated less than 12% of overall category engagement. This data highlights the significant impact that founder posts can have on driving traffic and engagement within the health tech industry. The study was conducted in New York and the findings were released on May 29, 2026.

data.description: The outlook for ordinary investors appears bleak when considering the high valuations of recently public companies like SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic.

data.title: ISG Introduces New Flagship, Executive-Level Event
data.description: In Stamford, Connecticut, the first-ever NXT.ai event will take place in Nashville from August 9 to 12. The event, part of the ISGEvents series, aims to help enterprise executives by providing insights into the strategies needed to run an intelligent enterprise.

data.title: In HelloNation, Drain Expert Michael Schroer Shares Signs That a Catch Basin Needs Cleaning
data.description: A recent publication highlights the importance of early detection of drainage problems and proper stormwater management in Indianapolis. The article, released on May 29, 2026, discusses key indicators signaling the need for catch basin maintenance in the city. HelloNation's piece offers insights on recognizing signs of clogged catch basins and emphasizes their timely cleaning to prevent potential issues. It serves as a valuable resource for Indianapolis residents seeking to uphold efficient stormwater management practices.

data.title: In HelloNation, Drain Expert Michael Schroer Details Catch Basin Cleaning for Commercial Properties
data.description: The importance of regular maintenance for stormwater management in commercial areas is highlighted in a recent article. In Columbus, Ohio, on May 29, 2026, it was reported that routine cleaning of catch basins plays a crucial role in preventing floods. The article by HelloNation recommends a specific frequency for cleaning catch basins on commercial properties to be effective in managing stormwater. This maintenance routine significantly contributes to reducing the risk of flooding incidents.

data.title: CFTC greenlights Bitcoin Perpetual Futures on Kalshi for U.S., offering contracts tied to BTC price.
data.description: The Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) has granted approval for Kalshi to introduce perpetual futures trading in the United States. This will begin with contracts linked to the price of Bitcoin.

data.title: Dell Is Up 80% Since Trump Told You To Buy It — Here's The Trade
data.description: President Trump's endorsement of Dell Technologies Inc. (NYSE: DELL) led to a significant surge in the stock price. Within 19 days of his recommendation to "buy a Dell," Dell Federal Systems secured a $9.69 billion Pentagon contract for Microsoft Corp. (NASDAQ: MSFT) software consolidation, expected to save $422 million annually. Dell then reported Q1 earnings of $43.84 billion, an 88% increase year-over-year, surpassing the $35.74 billion consensus by a whopping $8 billion. This news drove investors' interest and marked a profitable turn of events for those who acted on the president's tip.

data.title: Karat Packaging to join Wells Fargo's 16th Annual Global Industrials & Materials Conference.
data.description: Last month, 1,500 people were evacuated from their homes as a result of severe flooding in the region. The flooding was caused by heavy rainfall, which led to rivers overflowing and roads becoming impassable. Emergency services were able to rescue all of the evacuees, with no reported injuries. The local government has allocated $500,000 for relief efforts, providing shelter and supplies to those affected by the natural disaster. The cleanup process is expected to take several weeks, with many homes and buildings affected by the floodwaters.
